HandoffConfig.description:
Configuration for agent handoffs in the OpenAI agent system.

This class defines how one agent can hand off control to another agent,
including tool configuration, metadata, and execution parameters.

example.tool_description_override: Hand off to data analyst for comprehensive data analysis

target_agent.description: The target agent to hand off to. Can be an agent name (str) or an OpenAIAgentConfig instance.
target_agent.title: Target Agent

tool_name_override.description: Override the default tool name for this handoff. If not provided, uses the target agent's name.
tool_name_override.title: Tool Name Override

tool_description_override.description: Override the default tool description for this handoff. If not provided, uses the target agent's description.
tool_description_override.title: Tool Description Override

remove_tools_from_history.description: Whether to remove handoff tools from the conversation history when executing the handoff.
remove_tools_from_history.title: Remove Tools From History

is_enabled.description: Whether this handoff configuration is enabled. Disabled handoffs will not be available as tools.
is_enabled.title: Is Enabled

input_type.description: JSON Schema defining the expected structure of input data when handing off to the target agent. This schema is used to validate the data passed during handoff execution. If provided, the schema must include at least a 'type' field.
input_type.title: Input Type
